content.text: Implemented a fix for `kotlin-spring` enum query-param conversion when `enumPropertyNaming != original`. ### What I changed - Updated `modules/openapi-generator/src/main/resources/kotlin-spring/enumClass.mustache` to generate an additional: ```kotlin @JvmStatic fun fromString(value: String): EnumType = forValue(value) ``` Spring’s default `StringToEnumConverterFactory` looks for a static `fromString(String)` method on enums; without it, it falls back to `Enum.valueOf`, which breaks when enum constant names differ from wire values due to `enumPropertyNaming`. ### Tests - I created a temporary test + spec to reproduce the failure, verified the fix, then **deleted the temporary test/spec** as required. - Re-ran `KotlinSpringServerCodegenTest` suite to ensure no regressions. No commits were made.

No commits were made.
